_comment: AR.IO devnet deployment config. Public reference for downstream apps + agents that need to connect to the seeded devnet. Source-of-truth for program IDs and key PDAs. Update whenever programs are redeployed.
rpcUrlNote: Public devnet rate-limits aggressively (429s after a few requests). For high-volume work or live imports use a premium RPC (QuickNode, Helius, Triton). Override RPC_URL in your local .env.devnet.
authorityNote: Read-only for everyone except the deployer. Holds the upgrade authority for all 4 deployed programs.

programNotes.ario_ant_escrow: Not deployed on devnet. Blocked by sol_big_mod_exp syscall being inactive on all public clusters (Solana issue #28503). Localnet-only for now.

registryCapacity.note: Devnet shrink. Mainnet caps are 3000 / 200000. See DEVNET.md for current usage / free slots.

currentUsage.note: Snapshot at 2026-05-06 17:43 UTC. ArNS records grow as devs buy names; treasury debits as import_balance distributes credits to pre-registered holders + ArNS fees collect.

lastUpgrade.summary: PR #105 admin repair instructions (admin_repair_config / admin_repair_settings) + devnet-setup pre-flight. Configs realigned after cross-config mint mismatch from a 2026-05-05 partial-genesis double-run. SPL distribution flow now end-to-end functional.
